summary: Tested 'Apply to Trip' button feature in AI Itinerary modal. All features working correctly: (1) Apply to Trip green button visible in modal footer, (2) DB Match badges showing on activities with matching activity_ids (10 badges found), (3) Apply to Trip successfully fetches activities from DB and populates selectedActivities state, (4) Day cards in Trip Builder show added activities with prices (Full Day Tbilisi City Tour AED 335, Georgian Wine Tour AED 85), (5) Alert shown after applying (activities added notification), (6) Regenerate button works, (7) Close button dismisses modal. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%).

apply_to_trip_button.details: Green gradient button (emerald-500 to teal-500) visible in modal footer. Button text: 'Apply to Trip' with check icon. Button only appears when aiItinerary.days exists.

db_match_badges.details: DB Match badges (emerald-100 bg, emerald-700 text) appear on activities that have activity_id matching DB. Found 10 badges in test itinerary. Example: 'Full Day Tbilisi City Tour' has DB Match badge.

apply_activities_to_trip.details: Clicking Apply to Trip: (1) Fetches activities for trip cities via GET /api/activities?city=X, (2) Matches AI suggestions to DB activities by activity_id or name similarity, (3) Auto-selects default vehicle pricing (4 Seater Sedan for 2 pax), (4) Populates selectedActivities state. After apply: Total price updated from AED 0 to AED 420.

day_cards_populated.details: After Apply to Trip, Trip Summary shows: Day 2 - Tbilisi: Full Day Tbilisi City Tour (AED 335), Day 3 - Kakheti/Tbilisi: Georgian Wine Tour (AED 85). Activities section in Price Breakdown shows AED 420 total.

no_matches_alert.details: When DB matches exist, shows 'Applied X activities from the AI itinerary to your trip!' alert. If no matches, shows 'No matching activities found in the database' alert.

regenerate_button.details: Regenerate button visible in modal footer. Clicking closes modal and triggers new AI generation.

close_button.details: Close button dismisses modal without applying activities.

modal_close_after_apply.details: Modal automatically closes after Apply to Trip is clicked (setShowAiItinerary(false) called in handleApplyAiItinerary).

backend_ai_itinerary.details: Backend returns structured JSON with days array containing activities with activity_id field (used for DB matching). AI takes 15-25 seconds to respond.

critical_code_review_comments: handleApplyAiItinerary function (lines 326-387) correctly implements: fetch activities per city, match by activity_id first then name similarity, auto-select vehicle pricing, update selectedActivities state
DB Match badge correctly conditionally rendered at line 1805-1807: {act.activity_id && DB Match}
Apply to Trip button at lines 1900-1908 correctly conditionally rendered: only shows when aiItinerary?.days exists
Vehicle pricing auto-selection uses selectedVehicle.key from getVehicleTypeForPax(totalPax) - defaults to sedan_4 for 2 pax
seed_data_creation: Used existing activities in Tbilisi: Full Day Tbilisi City Tour (a77cadb3-...), Georgian Wine Tour - Kakheti (66fc27e9-...), Full Day Tour Ananuri (592f6274-...)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Apply to Trip feature fully tested and working. AI Itinerary modal data-testid: ai-itinerary-modal. Apply button data-testid: ai-apply-to-trip-btn. Regenerate button data-testid: ai-regenerate-btn. AI generation takes 15-35 seconds. DB Match badges appear on activities with activity_id. After applying, activities show in Trip Summary sidebar with vehicle pricing. Test flow: Login > Book FIT Package > Search Tbilisi 3 nights > Fill Dubai airport > Create Proposal > Click AI Generate Itinerary > Wait 35s > Check Apply to Trip button > Click Apply > Verify activities in Trip Summary.
